headline: Trade Tracker: Kevin Simpson buys Intuit, Palo Alto and more Caterpillar
summary: Kevin Simpson, Capital Wealth Planning founder and CIO, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to detail his latest portfolio moves.

headline: Investor Sentiment on Intuit (INTU) Shifts Following Weak Earnings Guidance
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the 11 best software stocks to invest in according to billionaires. Following the company’s earnings release on February 26, 2026, investors recalibrated their expectations, as Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) management’s expectations for Q3 profit are lower than those of Wall Street. After the results, the stock declined 4% in extended […]
